items.headline: Live Updates: Knicks-76ers, Spurs-Timberwolves meet in pivotal Game 3s on Prime Video
items.description: Check out the best from Friday's action in the 2026 NBA Conference Semifinals with our live blog, featuring Knicks-76ers, Spurs-Wolves.

items.headline: Dallas Mavericks name Mike Schmitz general manager
items.description: Schmitz will help lead the Mavs' scouting, player personnel, strategic planning and organizational collaboration across departments.

items.headline: Raptors' Brandon Ingram undergoes surgery to address ongoing right heel pain
items.description: The Raptors forward is expected to fully recover and be ready for training camp in September.

items.headline: The Athletic: Meet Karl-Anthony Towns’ biggest fan — the mother of a Marine killed in Afghanistan
items.description: In 2012, Towns, already a star at 16, paid tribute to a fallen Marine who had attended his school. The gesture sparked a lasting friendship.

items.headline: 2026 NBA Draft Lottery: Each team's representatives for Sunday's Draft Lottery
items.description: From franchise icons to current players and team executives, here's who will represent each of the 14 NBA Draft Lottery teams.

items.headline: FIBA Hall of Famer Clarisse Machanguana rebuilding after catastrophic flooding in Mozambique
items.description: Former WNBA player Clarisse Machanguana and her foundation are helping rebuild Mozambique after the Incomati River flooded the nation.

items.headline: Starting 5: Thunder, Pistons go up 2-0, plus a preview of Friday's slate
items.description: Detroit and OKC build 2-0 series leads while the Wolves seek a 2-1 edge and the 76ers look for a win in Game 3, too.

items.headline: 3 things to watch in Spurs-Timberwolves Game 3
items.description: Both teams look to sprint out of the gates in Game 3 while San Antonio attempts to grab back home-court advantage.

items.headline: 3 things to watch in Knicks-76ers Game 3
items.description: Health questions for both teams, Tyrese Maxey handling the blitz and paint discrepancies are all factors in Friday's clash.

items.headline: Live Updates: Thunder and Pistons Take 2-0 Series Lead
items.description: Updates, highlights and live scores for the Pistons-Cavaliers and Thunder-Lakers playoff matchups on Prime

items.headline: 4 takeaways: Cade Cunningham takes command as Pistons stake 2-0 series lead
items.description: Cade Cunningham drops 12 of his 25 points in the 4th, James Harden can't keep control & more from Detroit's Game 2 win.

items.headline: 4 takeaways: Chet Holmgren, Thunder guards deliver in Game 2 win over Lakers
items.description: OKC's depth shines through to keep it perfect during these playoffs while turnovers remain an issue for Los Angeles.

items.headline: Knicks' OG Anunoby (strained hamstring) questionable for Game 3 vs. Sixers
items.description: Anunoby is reportedly day to day with the injury he suffered in Game 2 vs. Philadelphia.

items.headline: Hornets give coach Charles Lee a contract extension after 25-win improvement
items.description: The 25-win improvement represented the largest year-over-year win total improvement in franchise history.

items.headline: Hornets guard Brandon Miller out indefinitely after surgery to address left shoulder instability
items.description: Miller will be out indefinitely and additional updates on his status will be provided as appropriate, the Hornets announced Wednesday.
